productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Brown Belt
description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts form an integral part of dressing. This signature leather belt from united colors of benetton is set to pump up your style and add zing to your attire. Length Freesize Made of leather for absolute durability, comfort and style Stylish press clasp and holes to customise Fit Brand symbol embossed inside the belt and brand name on the buckle for style Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner to maintain belt quality if necessary
